_meta.purpose: Honest-answer bank for ATS screening questions. apply-shared.mjs#matchScreening looks these up before any form is filled, so auto-reject conflicts (citizenship, location, YoE floor) surface BEFORE we tailor a CV.

actions.fill_and_flag: Fill honestly but warn the operator — the honest answer may auto-reject.
actions.discard: Honest answer is a hard disqualifier; abort apply, mark Discarded.

_meta.instructions: Copy to screening-questions.json and replace the {placeholder} fields with your real answers. Reference values come from config/profile.yml — keep them in sync.

patterns: are you a citizen of the united states
questions.honest_answer: {Yes/No — see config/profile.yml § work_authorization. If not a US citizen, this typically auto-discards.}
questions.note: If your work_authorization is anything other than US Citizen, set action=discard. See modes/_shared.md eligibility rule.
If you don't hold an active clearance, this auto-discards on clearance-required postings.

patterns: able to work out of our nyc office
questions.honest_answer: {Yes/No — based on config/profile.yml § location_policy. If not NYC and not willing to relocate, answer No and let the form gate handle it.}
questions.note: Many NYC-or-Remote postings have this binary screen; honest No may auto-reject if Remote isn't truly an option.

patterns: located in san francisco bay area or nyc
located in sf or new york
based in san francisco bay or new york
questions.note: If 'Remote' in posting actually means SF/NYC region-only, the role fails location gate.

patterns: authorized to work in the united states
authorized to work in the us
authorized to work in the country

questions.honest_answer: {Total YoE from config/profile.yml § candidate.yoe_total. If the JD floor exceeds this, action=discard.}
questions.note: Compare JD floor to candidate.yoe_total. YoE-floor mismatches are common.

questions.honest_answer: {Anchor from config/profile.yml § compensation.target_range. Format: '$NNN,NNN base; flexible on total comp + equity.'}
questions.note: Anchor at top of target_range; flex with equity. Many forms also accept numeric (e.g., 185000).

patterns: willing to work on us federal contract
willing to work on department of defense
questions.honest_answer: {Yes/No — typically requires US citizenship; see config/profile.yml § work_authorization}
questions.note: Federal-customer or DoD-contract postings typically auto-discard non-citizens.
